title: Smoky Slovakian Pappardelle Stir-fry
description: A light and umami-rich dish featuring pappardelle pasta combined with high-protein-friendly ingredients and a touch of smokiness.

ingredients.name: ground turkey or chicken breast
ingredients.notes: ensure it is fully cooked to safe temperatures

ingredients.name: garlic cloves, minced
ingredients.notes: adjust based on preference or allergy

instructions: Cook pappardelle pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add ground turkey or chicken breast and cook until no longer pink. Remove from pan and set aside.
Add onion, garlic, and mushrooms to the same pan; sauté for 5 minutes until fragrant and onions are translucent.
Return cooked pappardelle pasta and any cooking liquid (reserved) to the skillet with turkey or chicken, along with bell peppers. Mix well and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Stir in balsamic vinegar, smoked paprika, salt, pepper, and optional nutritional yeast until everything is evenly coated. Adjust seasoning as needed.
